rolling24hAccuracyTarget.policy: Every game remains scored. The 75% target is measured only by the rolling 24-hour audit of completed actionable picks.

accuracyTarget.policy: Every game remains scored. The 75% target is measured only by the rolling 24-hour audit of completed actionable picks.

pullCoverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

mlbB10Build.requires: 2 MLB_STRONG + 1 MLB_LEAN_OR_STRONG; zero true COIN_FLIP by default
mlbB10Build.message: MLB build refused: structure requires 1 Anchor, 1 Lean, and 1 Controlled Variable. Controlled Variable must have a real movement/market signal, not BOOK_AGREEMENT alone.

structureGate.message: MLB build refused: structure requires 1 Anchor, 1 Lean, and 1 Controlled Variable. Controlled Variable must have a real movement/market signal, not BOOK_AGREEMENT alone.

mlbB10Build.candidateFilterPolicy: Candidates are the post-score subset where frozen=true and selected grade is MLB_STRONG or MLB_LEAN. This full board shows the pre-filter scoring pass for every MLB game.

pullDiagnostics.policy: Every requested sport with active same-day games or matches must have convertible markets for timestamped storage. Diagnostic probes do not create snapshots.
